headline: Nucor (NUE) Stock Fair Value Rises After Analyst Target Changes
summary: Nucor’s fair value price target has been reset to US$258.41 from US$244.14, providing a clearer anchor for how current models frame the stock. Behind that move, recent analyst commentary points to a mix of higher targets into the mid to high US$200s, one trim to US$283, and fresh initiations, reflecting different views on Q2 guidance, steel pricing inputs, and execution across segments. Read on to see how these shifting targets fit into the broader Nucor story and how you can track the...
